introSection: Titan MAX (Japanese: タイタンＭＡＸ) was a steel roller coaster located at Space World in Fukuoka, Japan. It was built by Arrow Dynamics and opened on 5 March 1994.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
For the 2015 season, the original Arrow Dynamics trains were replaced with new ones from S&S Worldwide.

The ride closed on 31 December 2017 alongside the rest of Space World.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: The ride had yellow track and black supports. Previously, it was painted red with white supports.

fullText:
Titan MAX (Japanese: タイタンＭＡＸ) was a steel roller coaster located at Space World in Fukuoka, Japan. It was built by Arrow Dynamics and opened on 5 March 1994.

For the 2015 season, the original Arrow Dynamics trains were replaced with new ones from S&S Worldwide.

The ride closed on 31 December 2017 alongside the rest of Space World.



The ride had yellow track and black supports. Previously, it was painted red with white supports.
